modules.sql: SELECT wire_id, customer_id, direction, CAST(amount AS REAL) AS amount, COALESCE(counterparty_name, '') AS counterparty_name, status, CASE WHEN INSTR(COALESCE(counterparty_name, ''), 'OFFSHORE') > 0 THEN 'OFFSHORE_COUNTERPARTY' WHEN CAST(amount AS REAL) > 50000 THEN 'HIGH_AMOUNT' END AS flag_reason, as_of FROM wire_transfers WHERE INSTR(COALESCE(counterparty_name, ''), 'OFFSHORE') > 0 OR CAST(amount AS REAL) > 50000
